channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Unleashing America’s Mineral Potential: The Critical Minerals Commodity Supply Chain
item.description: Supply-side interventions are insufficient without parallel attention to demand-side anchors across the mine-to-manufactured-goods supply chain. A mine without a refinery, a refinery without a manufacturer, and a manufacturer without a customer are each stranded assets.

item.title: What the TotalEnergies Deal Means for Energy Investment, Political Risk, and Affordability
item.description: The Trump Administration’s $1 billion TotalEnergies deal does more than stop an offshore wind project—it establishes an executive precedent that bypasses Congress and courts, with far-reaching consequences for infrastructure investment across every sector.

item.title: USMCA Review 2026: Six Scenarios for North America’s Future
item.description: CSIS Americas Program Fellow Diego Marroquín Bitar and Senior Adviser and Scholl Chair Emeritus William Alan Reinsch explore and update a set of six potential scenarios for the future of the USMCA free trade agreement.
